description:
**Milestone:** Skill Library

Create three skill markdown files in .automaker/skills/: (1) monorepo-patterns.md — covers: build order (build:packages before build:server), package dependency chain, import conventions (always from @protolabs-ai/* packages, never from relative paths), TypeScript workspace resolution, how to add a new shared package. Include examples of correct vs incorrect imports. (2) worktree-patterns.md — covers: NEVER cd into worktrees (use git -C <path> or absolute paths), prettier --ignore-path /dev/null required for files in .worktrees/, pre-flight rebase before agent starts (git -C <worktree> fetch origin && rebase origin/dev), how to check for uncommitted work (git -C <worktree> status --short), stale worktree detection and recovery. Include the exact commands. (3) mcp-integration-patterns.md — covers: MCP tool structure (Zod schema, handler function, registration), error handling pattern (return {success: false, error: string}), how to add a new tool to the registry, testing MCP tools, the NEVER direct API calls rule. Each file should be 100-200 lines with clear sections, examples, and anti-patterns.

**Files to Modify:**
- .automaker/skills/monorepo-patterns.md
- .automaker/skills/worktree-patterns.md
- .automaker/skills/mcp-integration-patterns.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] monorepo-patterns.md exists with build order, import conventions, and package dependency chain
- [ ] worktree-patterns.md exists with NEVER cd warning, prettier fix, pre-flight rebase commands
- [ ] mcp-integration-patterns.md exists with tool structure, error handling, and registration guide
- [ ] Each file has anti-patterns section (what NOT to do)
- [ ] Each file has concrete command examples with exact syntax
- [ ] Files are 100-200 lines each, well-structured with ## headings

**Complexity:** small
